MAGIC_CORRUPTION_POWER.title: Magic Corruption
MAGIC_CORRUPTION_POWER.description: Your enchanted cards cost [blue]0[/blue]{Energy:energyIcons()} and [blue]0[/blue] [gold]Stars[/gold], and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] when played (Powers keep their normal destination).
SLIPPERY_POWER.description: The next time this creature takes damage, it only takes [blue]1[/blue] damage.
SLIPPERY_POWER.smartDescription: The next [blue]{Amount}[/blue] times [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] takes damage, it only takes [blue]1[/blue] damage each time.
